launch_inputs.content_goal: Create a launch-ready content packet explaining the new audit export experience and how enterprise operators should prepare for rollout.
launch_inputs.target_audience: Existing enterprise customers and internal customer-facing teams.
launch_inputs.source_material_context: Use the docs workspace plus the uploaded launch brief as the factual source package.

launch_inputs.content_goal: Turn the existing docs portal and launch brief into a tighter customer-facing content bundle for the export rollout.
launch_inputs.target_audience: Enterprise operators, success managers, and release communications.
launch_inputs.source_material_context: Use the host docs portal heavily and treat the uploaded launch brief as the approved narrative anchor.

launch_inputs.content_goal: Prepare a polished multi-asset content packet for the audit export launch, with operator guidance that is accurate and easy to reuse.
launch_inputs.target_audience: Enterprise customers plus internal success and support teams.
launch_inputs.source_material_context: Use the workspace docs and the uploaded launch brief as the approved source material.

steering_script.message: Bias the packet toward clarity, launch risk callouts, and concise operator-facing guidance instead of marketing tone.
